query:
SELECT t.tenant
            FROM tenants t
            WHERE $1 ^@ t.tenant
              AND t.enforce_sso
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM auth.identities ai
                WHERE ai.user_id = $2
                  AND ai.provider = 'sso'
                  AND ai.provider_id = t.sso_provider_id::text
              )
            LIMIT 1
